_comment: Stage-2 refine grid re-run at higher resolution Npts=97 (vs original Npts=65). Same axes as fell_heisenberg_refine.json. Pushes the discretization noise floor on dec_slack_min from ~5e-4 to ~5e-5 absolute, letting the boundary classifier reach near-100% CV accuracy IF the boundary surface is genuinely a degree-3 polynomial. Tests Task 2D.5c hypothesis. ~10080 points * ~6 sec/pt at Npts=97 / 16 cores ~ 63 min on cpu-xl, ~$1.05.
